resources.string: Pro
Upgrade SD Maid SE
SD Maid SE Pro offers better results, more features and options for power users.
Upgrade
Google Play is unavailable
SD Maid can\'t connect to Google Play. Is Google Play installed and up to date? Is your Google Account logged in? Try clearing the cache of the Google Play app and rebooting your device.
Google Play Issue
There was a problem with Google Play. Please try again later or restart your device.\n\nDetails: %s
Google Play error

An internal Google Play error occurred. Please try the following:

• Restart your device
• Clear Google Play Store cache
• Try again later
Connection error
Unable to connect to Google Play. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Already purchased
Use the \"Restore purchase\" option to restore your purchase. If the issue persists, try clearing Google Play cache and restarting your device.
Get SD Maid SE Pro
SD Maid has no ads and doesn\'t sell user data. My work is financed by you ❤️.
Upgrade benefits

• Clean app caches and expendable data
• Remove duplicate files
• Enable scheduled cleanups
• Create custom filters and cleanup rules
• Track storage trends and cleanup history
• More features and controls across the app
• Support continued development
Upgrade options
Same features, just different pricing models.
or
Yearly subscription
Renews yearly after the free trial. Cancel anytime in Google Play.
Renews yearly. Cancel anytime in Google Play.
Buy once
One payment, no renewals.
Prices couldn\'t be loaded right now. Check Google Play and try again in a moment.
Start free 14-day trial
Subscribe
One-time purchase
You are the best! ❤️
Restore purchase
Already bought Pro?
It looks like you upgraded to Pro on this device before. Restore your purchase to unlock it again.
Play Store synchronization may take time. Try rebooting, clearing Google Play cache or simply wait.
Multiple accounts can confuse Google Play. Install the app through the Google Play website, which forces associations with a specific account.
Congratulations!
You have %1$s, unlocked by your subscription.
You have %1$s, unlocked by your one-time purchase.
One-time purchase
You own the one-time Pro upgrade. Pro stays unlocked on this Google account. Thanks for supporting SD Maid ❤️.
Your Pro subscription is active and set to renew. Billing is managed by Google Play.
Prefer the one-time purchase? It becomes available once your subscription is no longer set to renew. Cancel the subscription in Google Play to switch.
Your Pro subscription is active, but not set to renew. Pro stays available until the current period ends.
This subscription is still set to renew, although you already own the one-time upgrade. You can cancel it in Google Play.
Manage subscription
This is a separate purchase: it does not cancel or refund your subscription. Use the same Google account for both.
Subscription still active

Google Play reports that your subscription is still set to renew. To buy the one-time upgrade, cancel the subscription in Google Play first, then come back here.\n\nJust cancelled it? Give Google Play a moment and try again. Also make sure you are using the same Google account.
Couldn\'t check your subscription status with Google Play. Please try again in a moment.
Purchase restored, your Pro upgrade is active.
Confirming your purchase
Pro is still active. Waiting for Google Play to re-confirm your purchase, all Pro features stay unlocked in the meantime.

Pro is still active, but Google Play hasn\'t confirmed your purchase for a while. If you bought Pro, restore the purchase and check that Google Play uses the account that bought it. If the subscription ended or the purchase was refunded, Pro will turn off by itself, nothing else to do.
Restoring asks Google Play to re-check this app\'s purchases for the current account. It does not start a new purchase.
Status looks wrong?
If a purchase is missing or this status looks incorrect, re-check with Google Play.
Contact support
SD Maid just checked Google Play, but no Pro purchase could be confirmed for the account Google Play is using for this app.
Still stuck? Contact support from the email that made the purchase and include your Google Play order number.
